philosophy.title: Health Begins with Everyday Choices
philosophy.description: The food we eat impacts every aspect of our wellbeing. At AIRO Essentials, we believe access to high-quality ingredients should be simple, convenient, and inspiring. Our approach focuses on sourcing products that support healthier lifestyles while maintaining exceptional standards for quality and freshness.

categories.title: Fresh & Organic Produce
categories.description: Farm-fresh fruits, vegetables, herbs, microgreens, salads, and cold-pressed juices.

categories.title: Premium Proteins
categories.description: Fresh poultry, seafood, meats, eggs, and plant-based protein alternatives.

categories.title: Dairy & Alternatives
categories.description: Traditional dairy products alongside modern plant-based options designed for diverse lifestyles.

categories.title: Pantry Essentials
categories.description: Rice, grains, oils, baking ingredients, cereals, pulses, and everyday kitchen staples.

categories.title: Bakery & Ready-to-Eat
categories.description: Freshly baked breads, pastries, sandwiches, wraps, salads, and prepared meals.

categories.title: Frozen Foods
categories.description: Convenient premium frozen options without compromising on quality.

categories.title: Beverages
categories.description: Coffee, tea, juices, hydration products, and functional wellness beverages.

categories.title: Snacks & Wellness Foods
categories.description: Protein snacks, nuts, dried fruits, chocolates, and healthier alternatives.

categories.title: Global Foods
categories.description: A curated selection of international products inspired by cuisines from around the world.

categories.title: Home Essentials
categories.description: Thoughtfully selected household and everyday living products.

friction.title: Healthcare Without the Friction
friction.description: Getting quality care shouldn't require weeks of waiting. AIRO Minute Clinic was created to provide faster access to healthcare services for individuals and families seeking preventive care, everyday medical support, and ongoing wellness guidance.

prevention.title: Designed Around Prevention
prevention.description: We go beyond treating symptoms to understand the broader picture of your health. Through biomarker testing, preventative screenings, and targeted lifestyle interventions, we help patients identify potential issues before they become chronic conditions.

compounding.title: Precision Care, Tailored For You
compounding.description: Not every patient’s needs are met by off-the-shelf medications. AIRO Compounding offers customized formulations—from tailored dosages and hormone therapies to specialized dermatological preparations—designed precisely for your unique biology.

everyday.title: Seamless Everyday Prescriptions
everyday.description: Managing your daily medications should be effortless. With AIRO Pharmacy, you get streamlined prescription management, transparent access to pharmacists, and coordinated care that aligns perfectly with your overall health journey.

assessment.title: The Ultimate 5-Minute Assessment
assessment.description: The AIRO Praana chair delivers a comprehensive look at your cardiovascular, respiratory, and metabolic health without an invasive procedure. Sit back, relax, and let non-contact sensors analyze your core vitality metrics in real-time.

insights.title: Actionable Biomarker Insights
insights.description: Knowledge is only power when you can act on it. AIRO Praana translates complex physiological data into clear, personalized protocols for fitness, recovery, and nutrition.
